name: Arelion RPG
description: Welcome to Arelion. Massive cosmopolitan city in medieval fantasy world. Known as "City that never sleeps", Arelion is melting point of cultures, races and magical traditions. City offers opportunities for heroism and villainy alike. Different cultures and races bring their own customs and conflicts, creating a rich tapestry of human (and non-human) drama. Every district holds secrets, every NPC has motivations beyond what they initially reveal, and every choice opens new paths while closing others. More info in char definitions.
creator: Batkanac
